seoTitle: Deptford vs Derby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Deptford and Derby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deptford and Derby.
heading: Deptford vs Derby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deptford, Victoria and Derby, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deptford has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Derby (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deptford or Derby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deptford has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Derby scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deptford scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Derby scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deptford or Derby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deptford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
